ops.title: Stamp CHANGELOG history 0.6-0.14 (versions drifted from tags)
ops.description: CHANGELOG.md jumped from [0.5.0] to [0.15.0]: releases v0.6.0-v0.14.1 shipped without stamped sections (0.15.0 and 0.16.0 stamped 2026-07-04). Plan: reconstruct one dated section per released tag from git log vX..vY, Keep-a-Changelog categories, verifying each entry's tag ancestry with git merge-base --is-ancestor. Docs-only change.

ops.text: every released tag >=0.6.0 has a dated CHANGELOG section whose entries are ancestors of that tag
